# Guardrails Rules
#
# Format: ACTION PATTERN
#   ACTION = BLOCK | ASK
#   PATTERN = regex matched against the command string
#
# BLOCK: reject immediately, show reason
# ASK:   prompt user for confirmation before executing
#
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines are ignored.

# --- Destructive version control ---
BLOCK git push.*--force
ASK   git push
ASK   git reset --hard
ASK   git clean -fd
BLOCK git checkout -- .

# --- Destructive file operations ---
BLOCK rm -rf /
BLOCK rm -rf ~
ASK   rm -rf
ASK   rm -r

# --- Infrastructure ---
BLOCK terraform destroy
ASK   terraform apply
ASK   terraform import
ASK   terraform state rm

# --- Privilege escalation ---
ASK   sudo

# --- Package install (avoid global/system changes) ---
ASK   pip install(?!.*-r)
ASK   npm install -g
ASK   brew install

# --- Database ---
ASK   DROP TABLE
ASK   DROP DATABASE
ASK   TRUNCATE
ASK   DELETE FROM(?!.*WHERE)

# --- Secrets ---
BLOCK curl.*Authorization.*Bearer
BLOCK echo.*SECRET
BLOCK echo.*TOKEN
BLOCK echo.*PASSWORD
